en: The second lot came out for Simeon, for the tribe of the people of Simeon, according to their clans, and their inheritance was in the midst of the inheritance of the people of Judah.
zh: 為西緬，就是為西緬支派，按著家族抽出第二籤；他們的產業是在猶大人的產業中間。

en: And they had for their inheritance Beersheba, Sheba, Moladah,
zh: 他們所得的產業有別是巴、示巴、摩拉大、

en: Hazar-shual, Balah, Ezem,
zh: 哈薩．書亞、巴拉、以森、

en: Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah,
zh: 伊利多拉、比土力、何珥瑪、

en: Ziklag, Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susah,
zh: 洗革拉、伯．瑪加博、哈薩．蘇撒、

en: Beth-lebaoth, and Sharuhen- thirteen cities with their villages;
zh: 伯．利巴勿、沙魯險，共十三座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊；

en: Ain, Rimmon, Ether, and Ashan- four cities with their villages,
zh: 又有亞因、利門、以帖、亞珊，共四座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊；

en: together with all the villages around these cities as far as Baalath-beer, Ramah of the Negeb. This was the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Simeon according to their clans.
zh: 以及這些城周圍所有的村莊，直到巴拉．比珥，就是南地的拉瑪。這就是西緬支派按著家族所得的產業。

en: The inheritance of the people of Simeon formed part of the territory of the people of Judah. Because the portion of the people of Judah was too large for them, the people of Simeon obtained an inheritance in the midst of their inheritance.
zh: 西緬人的產業是從猶大人的地業中得來的；因為猶大人的分過大，所以西緬人在猶大人的產業中得了他們的產業。

en: The third lot came up for the people of Zebulun, according to their clans. And the territory of their inheritance reached as far as Sarid.
zh: 為西布倫人，按著家族抽出第三籤；他們產業的境界去到撒立；

en: Then their boundary goes up westward and on to Mareal and touches Dabbesheth, then the brook that is east of Jokneam.
zh: 他們的疆界再向西上到瑪拉拉，直達大巴設，再去到約念前面的河；

en: From Sarid it goes in the other direction eastward toward the sunrise to the boundary of Chisloth-tabor. From there it goes to Daberath, then up to Japhia.
zh: 又從撒立向東轉到日出的方向，去到吉斯綠．他泊的境界，又伸展到大比拉，上到雅非亞；

en: From there it passes along on the east toward the sunrise to Gath-hepher, to Eth-kazin, and going on to Rimmon it bends toward Neah,
zh: 又從那裡往東面日出的方向，經過迦特．希弗，到以特．加汛、臨門，再伸展到尼亞；

en: then on the north the boundary turns about to Hannathon, and it ends at the Valley of Iphtahel;
zh: 又繞過尼亞的北面，到哈拿頓，直通到伊弗他．伊勒谷；

en: and Kattath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah, and Bethlehem- twelve cities with their villages.
zh: 還有加他、拿哈拉、伸崙、以大拉、伯利恆，共有十二座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: This is the inheritance of the people of Zebulun, according to their clans- these cities with their villages.
zh: 這些城和屬於這些城的村莊，就是西布倫人按著家族所得的產業。

en: The fourth lot came out for Issachar, for the people of Issachar, according to their clans.
zh: 為以薩迦，就是為以薩迦人，按著家族抽出第四籤。

en: Their territory included Jezreel, Chesulloth, Shunem,
zh: 他們的境界包括耶斯列、基蘇律、書念、

en: Hapharaim, Shion, Anaharath,
zh: 哈弗連、示按、亞拿哈拉、

en: Rabbith, Kishion, Ebez,
zh: 拉璧、基善、亞別、

en: Remeth, En-gannim, En-haddah, Beth-pazzez.
zh: 利蔑、隱．干寧、隱．哈大、伯．帕薛，

en: The boundary also touches Tabor, Shahazumah, and Beth-shemesh, and its boundary ends at the Jordan- sixteen cities with their villages.
zh: 又達到他泊、沙哈洗瑪、伯．示麥，直通到約旦河，共十六座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Issachar, according to their clans- the cities with their villages.
zh: 這些城和屬於這些城的村莊，就是以薩迦支派按著家族所得的產業。

en: The fifth lot came out for the tribe of the people of Asher according to their clans.
zh: 為亞設支派，按著家族抽出第五籤。

en: Their territory included Helkath, Hali, Beten, Achshaph,
zh: 他們的境界包括黑甲、哈利、比田、押煞、

en: Allammelech, Amad, and Mishal. On the west it touches Carmel and Shihor-libnath,
zh: 亞拉米勒、亞末、米沙勒，向西直達迦密和希曷．立納；

en: then it turns eastward, it goes to Beth-dagon, and touches Zebulun and the Valley of Iphtahel northward to Beth-emek and Neiel. Then it continues in the north to Cabul,
zh: 又轉往日出的方向，到伯．大袞，延伸到細步綸，向北去到伊弗他．伊勒谷、伯．以墨和尼業，又伸展到迦布勒的左邊，

en: Ebron, Rehob, Hammon, Kanah, as far as Sidon the Great.
zh: 到義伯崙、利合、哈們、加拿，直到西頓大城；

en: Then the boundary turns to Ramah, reaching to the fortified city of Tyre. Then the boundary turns to Hosah, and it ends at the sea; Mahalab, Achzib,
zh: 又轉到拉瑪，直到設防的城推羅；再轉到何薩，直通到海岸靠近亞革悉的地區；

en: Ummah, Aphek and Rehob- twenty-two cities with their villages.
zh: 又有烏瑪、亞弗、利合，共二十二座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Asher according to their clans- these cities with their villages.
zh: 這些城和屬於這些城的村莊，就是亞設支派按著家族所得的產業。

en: The sixth lot came out for the people of Naphtali, for the people of Naphtali, according to their clans.
zh: 為拿弗他利人抽出第六籤，就是拿弗他利人按著家族所得的產業。

en: And their boundary ran from Heleph, from the oak in Zaanannim, and Adami-nekeb, and Jabneel, as far as Lakkum, and it ended at the Jordan.
zh: 他們的疆界，是從希利弗，從撒拿音的橡樹林，從亞大米．尼吉和雅比聶起，去到拉共，直通到約旦河；

en: Then the boundary turns westward to Aznoth-tabor and goes from there to Hukkok, touching Zebulun at the south and Asher on the west and Judah on the east at the Jordan.
zh: 又向西轉到亞斯納．他泊，從那裡伸展到戶割，南邊達到西布倫，西邊達到亞設，東邊達到約旦河那裡的猶大。

en: The fortified cities are Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath, Chinnereth,
zh: 設防的城有西丁、側耳、哈末、拉甲、基尼烈、

en: Adamah, Ramah, Hazor,
zh: 亞大瑪、拉瑪、夏瑣、

en: Kedesh, Edrei, En-hazor,
zh: 基低斯、以得來、隱．夏瑣、

en: Yiron, Migdal-el, Horem, Beth-anath, and Beth-shemesh- nineteen cities with their villages.
zh: 以利穩、密大．伊勒、和璉、伯．亞納、伯．示麥，共十九座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Naphtali according to their clans- the cities with their villages.
zh: 這些城和屬於這些城的村莊，就是拿弗他利支派按著家族所得的產業。

en: The seventh lot came out for the tribe of the people of Dan, according to their clans.
zh: 為但支派，按著家族抽出第七籤。

en: And the territory of its inheritance included Zorah, Eshtaol, Ir-shemesh,
zh: 他們產業的境界包括：瑣拉、以實陶、伊珥．示麥、

en: Shaalabbin, Aijalon, Ithlah,
zh: 沙拉賓、亞雅崙、伊提拉、

en: Elon, Timnah, Ekron,
zh: 以倫、亭拿他、以革倫、

en: Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath,
zh: 伊利提基、基比頓、巴拉、

en: Jehud, Bene-berak, Gath-rimmon,
zh: 伊胡得、比尼．比拉、迦特．臨門、

en: and Me-jarkon and Rakkon with the territory over against Joppa.
zh: 美．耶昆、拉昆和約帕對面的地區。

en: When the territory of the people of Dan was lost to them, the people of Dan went up and fought against Leshem, and after capturing it and striking it with the sword they took possession of it and settled in it, calling Leshem, Dan, after the name of Dan their ancestor.
zh: 但人未能控制他們的境界，因此他們就上去攻打利善，奪取那城，用刀擊殺了城中的人；他們佔領利善，就住在城中，以他們祖先但的名字，把利善改名為但。

en: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Dan, according to their clans- these cities with their villages.
zh: 這些城和屬於這些城的村莊，就是但支派按著家族所得的產業。

en: When they had finished distributing the several territories of the land as inheritances, the people of Israel gave an inheritance among them to Joshua the son of Nun.
zh: 以色列人按著疆界把地分完了之後，就在他們中間把產業分給嫩的兒子約書亞。

en: By command of the LORD they gave him the city that he asked, Timnath-serah in the hill country of Ephraim. And he rebuilt the city and settled in it.
zh: 他們照著耶和華所吩咐的，把約書亞所要的城，就是以法蓮山地的亭拿．西拉，給了他；約書亞就修建那城，住在城中。

en: These are the inheritances that Eleazar the priest and Joshua the son of Nun and the heads of the fathers' houses of the tribes of the people of Israel distributed by lot at Shiloh before the LORD, at the entrance of the tent of meeting. So they finished dividing the land.
zh: 以上就是以利亞撒祭司和嫩的兒子約書亞，以及以色列人各支派的族長，在示羅會幕的門口，在耶和華面前，藉著抽籤所分的產業。這樣，他們就完成了分地的事。
